description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish, featuring a robust metal slide and frame. The grip is ergonomically contoured, made from a dark synthetic material, and appears to have a smooth surface with subtle texturing for improved handling. The trigger guard is rounded and generously sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of medium length, with a slightly recessed muzzle and no visible threading or compensator. The slide has minimal visible markings, with only faint engravings discernible along its side. The magazine base is flat and flush with the grip, lacking any pronounced extensions or finger rests.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with a contoured grip, rounded trigger guard, and a flat magazine base. The metal slide and frame are minimally marked and have a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the contoured grip, trigger guard, and the length of the slide and barrel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip, the hammer, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip, slide, and barrel profile, mirroring the details of the first side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle opening, barrel, and the front sight, with the slide's width visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a gentle palm swell and a smooth, dark synthetic surface. It lacks aggressive texturing but may have subtle stippling or a matte finish for basic slip resistance. The shape is slightly flared at the base for improved retention, and there are no visible finger grooves or logos. The grip panels are flush with the frame, providing a streamlined appearance without embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, with a smooth contour and no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is generously sized to accommodate gloved fingers and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, without integrated accessories or distinctive styling elements.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard, medium length with a smooth, non-threaded profile and a slightly recessed muzzle. There are no visible compensators, ports, or fluting, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings or special features are apparent on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide has minimal visible markings, with only faint, possibly engraved text or serial numbers along the side. There are no prominent manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative patterns, and the markings are subtle and not easily distinguishable.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, lacking any extensions, flares, or finger rests. It has a simple, squared-off design with no visible logos, texturing, or embellishments, contributing to the handgun's streamlined appearance.
